allow: PowerShell($tools = @{}; foreach \($name in @\('magick','inkscape','rsvg-convert','node','npx'\)\) { $cmd = Get-Command $name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { $tools[$name] = $cmd.Source } else { $tools[$name] = 'X' } }; $tools | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($chromePaths = @\('C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe', 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe', 'C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe'\); foreach \($p in $chromePaths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } })

PowerShell(Copy-Item 'C:\\Users\\MSI\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\og-image-out.png' 'c:\\Users\\MSI\\Desktop\\개발\\Sanctum OS\\assets\\og-image.png' -Force; Remove-Item 'C:\\Users\\MSI\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\og-image-out.png' -Force; Remove-Item 'C:\\Users\\MSI\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\og-render.html' -Force; $f = Get-Item 'c:\\Users\\MSI\\Desktop\\개발\\Sanctum OS\\assets\\og-image.png'; Write-Output "✓ $\($f.Name\): $\($f.Length\) bytes")

PowerShell(Copy-Item 'C:\\Users\\MSI\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\favicon-32-out.png' 'c:\\Users\\MSI\\Desktop\\개발\\Sanctum OS\\assets\\favicon-32.png' -Force; Copy-Item 'C:\\Users\\MSI\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\favicon-16-out.png' 'c:\\Users\\MSI\\Desktop\\개발\\Sanctum OS\\assets\\favicon-16.png' -Force; Remove-Item 'C:\\Users\\MSI\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\favicon-32-out.png','C:\\Users\\MSI\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\favicon-16-out.png','C:\\Users\\MSI\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\favicon-32-render.html','C:\\Users\\MSI\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\favicon-16-render.html' -Force; Get-Item 'c:\\Users\\MSI\\Desktop\\개발\\Sanctum OS\\assets\\favicon-32.png','c:\\Users\\MSI\\Desktop\\개발\\Sanctum OS\\assets\\favicon-16.png' | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Length\) bytes" })
